name: Roulette Special
title: Roulette Special
desc: Colorful drinks. It might be more accurate to call this a table game than nourishment of any sort, one where the rules are to drink whatever drink the pointer falls on.

skills.desc:
The target character gains 4 random buffs from the following effects:
Heal the target character for 2 HP.
The target character gains +1 Max HP.
The next Skill the target character uses costs 1 less Elemental Die.
The target character deals +1 DMG the next time they do damage.
(A character can consume at most 1 Food per Round)
